start_cluster.guidance: Cluster ID of the root/progenitor population. If known, improves trajectory accuracy.

end_clusters.guidance: Terminal cluster IDs. Optional — Slingshot can infer endpoints automatically.

reducedDim.guidance: Which embedding to use. PCA is more principled; UMAP is for visualization but may distort distances.

n_pcs.guidance: Number of PCs to use when reducedDim='PCA'.

outputs.lineage_curves: Fitted principal curves for each lineage

validation.check: Pseudotime values should span a reasonable range. Multiple lineages should correspond to known differentiation branches.
